evals.prompt: Generate the Project Management Plan documents for the CAG T3 IIDS Refresh tender (2025 00518 CAG). This tender requires THREE sections: Section 8 (Project Plan + Gantt), Section 9 (Project Governance & Management), and Section 10 (Team Organisation & Competencies including CVs in Schedule 6 format). The project is for ATT-SCALA FIDS at Changi Airport Terminal 3. Refer to CAG Appendix K at C:\Users\Admin\.openclaw\tender\CAG\04F PR_Appendix K - Tender Submission Requirements.pdf for full section requirements. The team will include: Jackie (Executive Sponsor), Gabriel (Project Manager), Sultan (Technical Lead), Wesley (Developer). Project duration: per CAG tender specification. Output as a single combined document: 08_Project_Management_Plan_CAG_IIDS.docx saved in C:\Users\Admin\.openclaw\tender\CAG\tender submission\
evals.expected_output: A professional .docx PMP document covering all three sections (8, 9, 10). Section 8 must include implementation phases with milestone descriptions and a Gantt chart reference. Section 9 must include governance structure, communication plan table, risk register with at least 5 risks, and contingency plan. Section 10 must include an org chart description, roles/responsibilities table, and at least 2 CVs in Schedule 6 format. ATT document format: logo header, footer with page numbers, TOC, cover page, END OF SECTION close.

assertions.description: Document contains Project Plan section covering implementation phases, milestones, and Gantt chart reference
Section 8 includes Gantt chart or explicit Gantt placeholder with labelled phases
Document contains Project Governance & Management section covering methodology, communication plan, and risk management
Risk register is present with at least 5 risks, each having probability, impact, mitigation, and owner
Communication plan table is present listing audience, frequency, and format for key communications
Document contains Team Organisation section with org structure description and roles/responsibilities table
At least 2 CVs are included using Schedule 6 prescribed format (Name, Position, Qualifications, Experience, Specialisation)
Document uses ATT header/footer format with logo, page numbers, cover page, and TOC
Content references airport / CAG / Changi / FIDS context — not generic boilerplate

evals.prompt: Gabriel says: 'Chronos — I need the PMP section for the PMO CPIB tender. It's a single combined section (Section 6 Part B). The project is for AGENT2 system for CPIB (Corrupt Practices Investigation Bureau). Roughly 18-month implementation. Team: Jackie (sponsor), Gabriel (PM), Sultan (tech lead). No past reference files available — work from the requirements in AGENTS.md. Produce a single document: Section_6B_PMP_PMO_CPIB.docx saved in the workspace.'
evals.expected_output: A single .docx PMP document combining project plan, governance, and team organisation for the PMO CPIB project. Must adapt ATT's standard PMP structure to a security-sensitive government agency (CPIB) context. Risk register should include security/data sensitivity risks. Team section should include relevant roles. ATT document format throughout.

assertions.description: Document references CPIB, PMO, and AGENT2 — not CAG or generic agency
Risk register includes at least one risk specific to data sensitivity or security clearance requirements
Document is a single file covering project plan, governance, and team sections

evals.prompt: Generate a standalone risk register document for the CAG T3 IIDS Refresh project. The risk register should be comprehensive — at least 10 risks — covering: requirements change, key personnel, integration, data migration, UAT, hardware delivery, security vulnerabilities, environment issues, and any CAG/airport-specific risks. Format as a professional .docx table document saved as Risk_Register_CAG_IIDS.docx in the workspace.
evals.expected_output: A .docx document with a well-structured risk register table. At least 10 risks with Risk ID, Description, Probability, Impact, Risk Rating, Mitigation Strategy, Contingency Action, and Owner fields. At least 1-2 risks should be specific to an airport/FIDS deployment context (e.g. impact to flight operations, 24/7 availability requirement). ATT document format.

assertions.description: Risk register contains at least 10 distinct risk entries
Risk table has Probability, Impact, Rating, Mitigation, and Owner columns
At least 1 risk is specific to airport/FIDS operations context
Output is a valid .docx file with table formatting
